title: The New Climate War
author: Michael Mann
subline: The fight to take back the green agenda.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- The hockey-stick curve. The flat historical part is ash; the sharp upward modern spike is RED. The 1.5°C threshold is a horizontal red dashed line. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <!-- Axes -->
    <line x1="-700" y1="280" x2="700" y2="280" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="-700" y1="280" x2="-700" y2="-300" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- 1.5°C threshold red dashed line -->
    <line x1="-700" y1="-100" x2="700" y2="-100" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="8 6"/>
    <text x="-720" y="-95" text-anchor="end" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">+1.5°C</text>
    <!-- The historical flat part (ash) -->
    <path d="M -680 200 L -640 180 L -600 160 L -560 140 L -520 120 L -480 100 L -440 80 L -400 60 L -360 40 L -320 20" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- The sharp upward modern part (RED), crossing the threshold -->
    <path d="M -320 20 Q -200 -20 -100 -80 Q 50 -160 200 -200 Q 350 -240 500 -260 L 600 -270" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- The 12 tick marks along the baseline (decades) -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1">
      <line x1="-660" y1="280" x2="-660" y2="290"/><line x1="-580" y1="280" x2="-580" y2="290"/>
      <line x1="-500" y1="280" x2="-500" y2="290"/><line x1="-420" y1="280" x2="-420" y2="290"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="280" x2="-340" y2="290"/><line x1="-260" y1="280" x2="-260" y2="290"/>
      <line x1="-180" y1="280" x2="-180" y2="290"/><line x1="-100" y1="280" x2="-100" y2="290"/>
      <line x1="-20" y1="280" x2="-20" y2="290"/><line x1="60" y1="280" x2="60" y2="290"/>
      <line x1="140" y1="280" x2="140" y2="290"/><line x1="220" y1="280" x2="220" y2="290"/>
      <line x1="300" y1="280" x2="300" y2="290"/><line x1="380" y1="280" x2="380" y2="290"/>
      <line x1="460" y1="280" x2="460" y2="290"/><line x1="540" y1="280" x2="540" y2="290"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Year labels (a few anchor years) -->
    <g font-size="11
rationale: The hockey-stick climate curve. The flat historical part is ash; the sharp upward modern part is RED, crossing a red dashed 1.5°C threshold. 280px weight-500 title at the top.
